system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss linearUpwind grad(U);
    div(phi,k)      Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,omega)  Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-07;
        minIter         1;
        maxIter         500;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

GAMG
{
    nPreSweeps      0;
    nPostSweeps     2;
    cacheAgglomeration on;
    agglomerator    faceAreaPair;
    nCellsInCoarsestLevel 10;
    mergeLevels     1;
    smoother        GaussSeidel;
    tolerance       1e-07;
    relTol          0;
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    200;
    nCorrectors         2;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 1;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;

    fieldValues
    {
        p0 uniform 0;
    }

    residualControl
    {
        U               1e-5;
        p               1e-5;
    }

    transientScheme     backwardEuler;

    adjustTimeStep      yes;
    adjustDeltaT        yes;

    maxCo               0.05;

    relaxationFactors
    {
        equations
        {
            U               0.7;
            k               0.7;
            epsilon         0.7;
            p               0.3;
        }
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.3;

maxDeltaT       0.0001;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.01;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           0.01;
')]</foamfiles>

<review_analysis># Error Diagnosis and Resolution

## Error Analysis

Looking at the current error, the situation is crystal clear:

```
keyword deltaT is undefined in dictionary ".../system/controlDict"
```

Both `log.pimpleFoam` and `log.blockMesh` fail because `deltaT` is missing from `controlDict`. The current `controlDict` has `maxDeltaT 0.0001` but **does not have a `deltaT` entry**. In OpenFOAM 10's `pimpleFoam`, the solver requires `deltaT` to be explicitly defined — `maxDeltaT` alone is not sufficient. The `deltaT` serves as the initial time step value.

## Root Cause

The `controlDict` file is missing the `deltaT` keyword. Previous attempts tried various workarounds (removing hard-coded deltaT, relying solely on `adjustTimeStep`), but in OpenFOAM 10, `pimpleFoam` explicitly looks up `deltaT` from the dictionary. Having only `maxDeltaT` is insufficient.

## Recommended Fix

### 1. Add `deltaT` to `system/controlDict`

Add the `deltaT` entry to the `controlDict` file. Since the user specifies "use timestep of 0.0001", set it to that value:

```
deltaT              0.0001;
```

Place it appropriately within the `controlDict` dictionary (typically alongside `maxDeltaT`, `writeInterval`, etc.).

The complete `deltaT`/`maxDeltaT` section should look like:

```
deltaT              0.0001;
maxDeltaT         0.0001;
```

### 2. Keep all other settings unchanged

All other configurations from previous attempts (PIMPLE settings, relaxation factors, GAMG settings, boundary conditions) appear stable — the simulation is no longer crashing or diverging. The only remaining issue is this missing dictionary entry.

## Summary

The **sole fix** is adding `deltaT 0.0001;` to the `system/controlDict` file. OpenFOAM 10's `pimpleFoam` requires `deltaT` to be explicitly present in the control dictionary (separate from `maxDeltaT`). This is a required entry for the solver to determine the initial time step.</review_analysis>
<user_requirement>do a Reynolds-Averaged Simulation (RAS) pitzdaily simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm. The domain is a 2D millimeter-scale channel geometry. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 10m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls. Use timestep of 0.0001 and output every 0.01. Finaltime is 0.3. use nu value of 1e-5.</user_requirement>
Return strict JSON now with key target_files only.
response: target_files=[PlannedFileChange(file='system/controlDict', changes='Add deltaT 0.0001; entry before maxDeltaT line')]
